verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The world will try to satisfy The longing in your soul You may search this wide world o'er But you'll be just as before You'll never find true satisfaction (Not) until you found the Lord For only Jesus can satisfy your soul

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Only Jesus can satisfy your soul And only He can change your life And make you whole He'll give you peace you never knew Sweet love and joy and heaven, too For only Jesus can satisfy your soul

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you could have the fame and fortune All the wealth you could obtain Yet you have no Christ within Your living here would be in vain There'll come a time when death shall call you Riches cannot help you then So come to Jesus for only He can satisfy.
